message:
fix(indexer): correct stale detection grace period and redact JSON keys

StaleDetector (indexer/mod.rs):
- Add a start_time field to StaleDetector so that when no successful
  ingest has ever occurred, the detector compares elapsed time against
  the threshold rather than immediately reporting stale. Previously,
  the None arm unconditionally returned true, causing false stale
  warnings immediately after startup before the first scan cycle could
  complete. Now the detector waits for the threshold duration from
  creation before considering the absence of ingests as stale.

Secret redaction (indexer/redact_secrets.rs):
- In redact_json(), also run redact_text() on JSON object keys, not
  just values. Secrets can appear in map keys (e.g., when tool results
  contain headers or environment variable mappings with sensitive data
  embedded in the key name). The redacted key replaces the original in
  the output map.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
